authority_proof: Title: NYC's Leading IVF Clinics | NYU Langone Fertility Center
NYC's Leading IVF Clinics | NYU Langone Fertility Center
Through world-class science and care, our New York City fertility clinics help people have healthy babies, when they're ready.
Join the thousands of patients who've placed their trust in our experts to deliver outstanding clinical outcomes – with efficiency, transparency, and personalization.
testimonials: I truly felt that we came up with our fertility plan together, which helped make me feel more involved and in control.

I am writing this review pregnant, and it is all thanks to Dr. DeVore. I switched to NYU after having a negative experience at a previous clinic where I was informed there was zero chance I would conceive.
target_audience: Future family planners and patients considering IVF or egg freezing
